name: Log Explorer Pro
description: Advanced log search and analysis interface with streaming log viewer, structured query filters, and contextual log detail inspection.

page_briefs.logs: Split-view log exploration screen. A persistent filter bar at the top supports structured queries with field autocomplete, severity toggles, and time range selection. Below, a real-time log stream scrolls new entries as they arrive with color-coded severity levels. A compact data table at the bottom provides a sortable, paginated view for historical log queries.
page_briefs.log-detail: Single log entry detail view. Left panel shows a collapsible JSON viewer rendering the full structured log payload with syntax highlighting and path copying. Right panel displays a compact trace waterfall linking the log entry to its parent span and surrounding trace context for correlated debugging.
